overall.description: First-person exploration of a wealthy residential neighborhood in GTA V (Los Santos), walking along manicured streets past walled estates, entering two separate gated mansion properties to view their architecture and gardens, then returning to the street. The Vinewood sign is visible on the distant hills throughout the clip.

scene_state.functional_zone: wealthy residential street with high estate walls

agents.ego_description: walking steadily along the sidewalk past estate walls, trash bins, and manicured hedges

entered.detail: tall cream-colored stucco wall with stone trim running along the left side of the sidewalk
blue recycling bin on the curb next to the street
tall evergreen trees lining the opposite side of the street
large white sign on distant hillside resembling the Hollywood sign

segments.scene_description: The camera walks along a sunlit residential sidewalk bordered by high estate walls on the left and a tree-lined street on the right. Trash bins sit on the curb, and the distant Vinewood sign is visible on the hills ahead.

scene_state.functional_zone: gated mansion driveway with circular entry

events.description: turns left off sidewalk into mansion driveway through open iron gate
turns around to exit the property back toward the street

agents.ego_description: entering the gated property to view the mansion facade, then turning to leave

entered.detail: ornate black metal driveway gate with stone pillars, currently open
large Mediterranean-style mansion with distinctive teal-tinted windows and red tile roof
paved circular entry court with brick inlay patterns

segments.scene_description: The camera turns into a gated estate, passing through an open iron gate to reveal a Mediterranean mansion with green-tinted windows. After viewing the circular driveway and facade, the camera turns around to exit back toward the street.

scene_state.functional_zone: mansion front lawn with formal garden path

events.description: enters second mansion property passing red for-sale sign
turns around at the front entrance to walk back toward the street

agents.ego_description: walking up the brick pathway toward the mansion entrance, then turning around to exit

entered.detail: red and white real estate sign with 'For Sale' text on the lawn
large two-story beige stucco mansion with red tile roof and arched windows
red brick walkway leading from street to front entrance with stone steps
meticulously trimmed tall boxwood hedges flanking the pathway

segments.scene_description: Entering a second estate marked by a for-sale sign, the camera walks across a manicured lawn and up a brick pathway toward a beige stucco mansion. The path is lined with tall hedges and stone planters. Upon reaching the front steps, the camera turns around to head back.

events.description: exits mansion property back onto the sidewalk

agents.ego_description: walking along the street past estate walls and gated entrances

entered.detail: another gated estate entrance with tall cypress trees visible down the street
tall narrow evergreen trees marking the next property boundary

segments.scene_description: Back on the street, the camera continues walking past estate walls and gated entrances. The stone wall returns to the left side, and distant cypress trees mark the next property down the road as the exploration continues.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous first-person journey along a wealthy residential street, venturing into two private estates before returning to the public sidewalk. It begins by walking past high estate walls and trash bins under a bright sun, with the Vinewood sign visible on the distant hills. The camera then turns through an open iron gate to explore a Mediterranean mansion with green-tinted windows and a circular driveway before pivoting back toward the road. This movement shifts into a second property marked by a for-sale sign, where the camera follows a brick pathway through manicured lawns and tall hedges toward a beige stucco facade. Finally, the scene returns to the main street, continuing past stone walls and cypress trees as the exploration moves further down the neighborhood.
